Class GTNetMessageHelper

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.m2m.GTNetMessageHelper
public abstract class GTNetMessageHelper extends Object
Helper class for GTNet message operations. Provides utility methods for common GTNet operations like retrieving the local GTNet entry ID and sending ping messages to remote peers.

  • Method Details

    • getGTNetMyEntryIDOrThrow

      public static Integer getGTNetMyEntryIDOrThrow(GlobalparametersJpaRepository globalparametersJpaRepository)
      Retrieves the GTNet entry ID for this server, throwing if not configured.
      Parameters:
      globalparametersJpaRepository - the repository to query global parameters
      Returns:
      the GTNet entry ID for this server
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if GTNet entry ID is not configured

    • sendPingWithStatus

      public static BaseDataClient.SendResult sendPingWithStatus(BaseDataClient baseDataClient, GTNet sourceGTNet, GTNet targetGTNet, GlobalparametersJpaRepository globalparametersJpaRepository)
      Sends a ping message to a remote GTNet server and returns the status result. This method is used by the GTNetServerStatusCheckTask to check the reachability and busy status of remote peers without going through the full message persistence flow.
      Parameters:
      baseDataClient - the HTTP client for M2M communication
      sourceGTNet - the local GTNet entry (provides serverBusy and domain info)
      targetGTNet - the remote GTNet entry to ping
      Returns:
      SendResult containing reachability status and response
